meta.title: Amanthos Group | Real Estate, Hotels & Serviced Apartments
meta.description: Amanthos Group combines premium real estate, hotels, and serviced apartments in Switzerland and Germany. Quality, innovation, and hospitality.

hero.title: Commercial Real Estate Services & Investments
hero.subtitle: Amanthos Group – strategic real estate development, investment advisory and hotel management in Switzerland and Germany.

about.label: Our Divisions
about.title: Three Pillars of Excellence
about.subtitle: Amanthos Group unites three complementary business areas under one roof – with a strong presence in Switzerland and Germany.

real_estate.title: Real Estate
real_estate.description: Strategic real estate development and management at prime locations in Switzerland and Germany. From acquisition to value creation.
real_estate.detail_1: International Expansion for Hotel Brands, Restaurants or Retail

hotels.title: Hotels
hotels.description: Unique hotels that combine Swiss hospitality with modern design. Each property tells its own story.

serviced_apartments.title: Serviced Apartments
serviced_apartments.description: Fully furnished apartments with hotel comfort for business and long-stay guests. Flexible, comfortable, like home.

celebration.label: Anniversary
celebration.title: 5 Years of Amanthos Group
celebration.subtitle: Celebrate with us five years of passion, growth, and hospitality.

hotels.label: Our Hotels
hotels.title: Unique Hotels in Switzerland
hotels.subtitle: Three exceptional properties, three unique experiences.

prize.name: Prize by Radisson
prize.description: A modern design hotel in collaboration with Radisson. Contemporary comfort meets first-class service in the Zurich region.

chalet.name: Chalet Swiss
chalet.description: Alpine charm in the heart of Interlaken. Traditional Swiss hospitality with views of the Eiger, Mönch, and Jungfrau.

mulin.name: Hotel Mulin by Amanthos
mulin.description: A boutique hotel with a charming restaurant and bar. Culinary excellence and cozy atmosphere combined.

real_estate.label: Real Estate
real_estate.title: Real Estate
real_estate.description: Amanthos Group develops and manages properties at selected locations in Switzerland and Germany. Our focus is on sustainable value creation and long-term partnerships.
features: International Expansion for Hotel Brands, Restaurants or Retail

serviced_apartments.label: Serviced Apartments
serviced_apartments.title: Living with Hotel Comfort
serviced_apartments.description: Amanthos Living offers fully furnished serviced apartments in Zurich, Solothurn, and Nyon. Ideal for business travelers and long-stay guests who want more than a hotel room.
serviced_apartments.room_description: Spacious, light-filled apartments with everything you need. High-quality furnishings, fully equipped kitchen, and an ambiance that feels like home from the moment you arrive.
